instruction: Start facing the window with cabinets below it. Turn left, keeping the cabinet unit with a wine rack on your right. Walk straight past the large built-in cabinet unit on your left and a living room entrance on your right. Then, turn left and go through the open doorway, stopping at its threshold facing the outdoor grassy area.
